phase_rows.rule: control core, confirmation, sentiment leadership, and mirror layers are separated before execution research.
only decisive events enter control semantics; structural regimes are discovered from board state rather than year buckets.
only point-in-time or lagged regime proxies are allowed in EOD supervised training.
lawful replay is allowed only after zero-trigger is explained and replay actually executes under the same EOD legality boundary.
probe/full stratification may improve shadow economics, but promotion is blocked until full eligibility has real supervised support.
before promotion, quantify where full-eligibility labels are missing and whether scarcity is caused by split geometry or structural absence.
only promote a replay-facing candidate if it is lawful, economically positive, and not dependent on unsupported shadow strata.

interpretation: V1.26K freezes the commercial aerospace research order after the first lawful replay and two-layer shadow improvement are both on disk.
The next blocker is no longer legality or zero-trigger geometry; it is missing supervised support for the full-eligibility layer.
